narrative:
Reading 2-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 990 registered voters, with 69.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
